ddls:
CREATE TABLE "spatial_data" (
  "spatial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spatial data point */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location name or description */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the spatial data point */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city where the location is situated */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the location is situated */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the location */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the spatial data point was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the spatial data point was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spatial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spatial_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spatial_data_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "temporal_data" (
  "temporal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each temporal data point */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the temporal data point */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the temporal data point */,
  "time_granularity" TEXT /* Time granularity (e.g., minute, hour, day) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the temporal data (e.g., sensor, IoT device, social media) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the temporal data point was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the temporal data point was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("temporal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_data" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event data point */,
  "spatial_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the spatial data point */,
  "temporal_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the temporal data point */,
  "target_normal" INTEGER /* Target value for normal event occurrence */,
  "normal_target" INTEGER /* Normal target value */,
  "occurrence_t_10" INTEGER /* Event occurrence 10 time units ago */,
  "occurrence_t_9" INTEGER /* Event occurrence 9 time units ago */,
  "occurrence_t_8" INTEGER /* Event occurrence 8 time units ago */,
  "occurrence_t_7" INTEGER /* Event occurrence 7 time units ago */,
  "occurrence_t_6" INTEGER /* Event occurrence 6 time units ago */,
  "occurrence_t_5" INTEGER /* Event occurrence 5 time units ago */,
  "occurrence_t_4" INTEGER /* Event occurrence 4 time units ago */,
  "occurrence_t_3" INTEGER /* Event occurrence 3 time units ago */,
  "occurrence_t_2" INTEGER /* Event occurrence 2 time units ago */,
  "occurrence_t_1" INTEGER /* Event occurrence 1 time unit ago */,
  "occurrence_t" INTEGER /* Event occurrence at the current time unit */,
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of event */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the event occurrence */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event data point was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event data point was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_data_event_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_type_id") REFERENCES event_types ("event_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_data_temporal_id FOREIGN KEY ("temporal_id") REFERENCES temporal_data ("temporal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_data_spatial_id FOREIGN KEY ("spatial_id") REFERENCES spatial_data ("spatial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "event_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  "severity" INTEGER /* Severity level of the event type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the event data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the event data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES event_data ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event data the prediction is based on */,
  "predicted_occurrence" INTEGER /* Predicted occurrence of the event */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the prediction */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was generated */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the prediction model used */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the prediction was generated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the prediction was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES event_data ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "anomalies" (
  "anomaly_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each anomaly */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event data where the anomaly was detected */,
  "anomaly_type" TEXT /* Type of the anomaly */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the anomaly */,
  "detected_date" TEXT /* Date when the anomaly was detected */,
  "severity" INTEGER /* Severity level of the anomaly */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the anomaly was detected */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the anomaly was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("anomaly_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_anomalies_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES event_data ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the city is situated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the city was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the city was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the country was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the country was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)
